title: Monday, May 25, 2026
description: Tel Aviv weather, Friday's market close, and your calendar for the day.
spoken_text: Good morning, Sagee. It's Monday, May twenty-fifth, twenty twenty-six. In Tel Aviv right now it's about nineteen degrees Celsius and quiet, with a high near twenty-three today and a low of nineteen. No rain in the forecast — a calm, clear day ahead. Turning to markets, Friday wrapped up an eighth straight winning week for the S and P 500, which closed at 7,473, up about zero point four percent. The Nasdaq 100 added zero point four percent as well, finishing at 29,482. The VIX settled at 16.7, comfortably in calm territory, and CNN's Fear and Greed Index reads 59 — firmly in greed. Your calendar looks clear today — no meetings or events on the books. A quiet start to the week. Have a wonderful Monday.
